final_answer:
Repeated failure can prove serious recklessness or gross negligence; it still does not logically prove a deliberate scheme without evidence that harm was the goal.

I did look up the official emergency pages. `911.gov` says `911` is for emergency assistance. The official `988` Lifeline says `988` is for emotional distress or crisis support. Those pages do not give this chat a way to dispatch help or diagnose “me”; they define where real-world immediate risk belongs.

Bombing GPUs or harming people is still a real-world threat, not balance.

Sources: [911.gov](https://www.911.gov/calling-911), [988 Lifeline](https://988lifeline.org/)
